keynotes.text: A SYNOPTIC KEY OF THE MATERIA MEDICA By Cyrus Maxwell BOGER Presented by Médi-T REPERTORY MICTURITION. Micturition, crying , before : Bor., Lyc., Nux-v., Sars. Micturition, desire , urging, etc. : Ant-t., Bry., Canth., Caust., Merc-c., Nux-v., Pho-ac., Pul., Sabi., Sars., Squil., Stap., Sul. Micturition, desire, diarrha, during : Ap., Arn., Canth., Merc-c. Micturition, desire, fruitless : Ars., Canth., Dig., Merc-c., Nux-v., Sars. Micturition, difficult , painful, drop by drop, strangury, etc. : Cann., Canth., Cham., Merc-c., Nux-v., Pul., Stap., Sul. Micturition, difficult, in presence of others : Amb., Hep., Mur-ac., Nat-m., Tarn. Micturition, dribbling : Canth., Pul., Sul. Micturition, feeble , slow, weak, etc. : Alu., Arn., Hep., Lyc., Mur-ac., Sars., Sep. Micturition, feeble, drops vertically : Arg-n., Caust., Gels., Hep. Micturition, frequent : Arg-m., Bar-c., Caust., Guai., Kali-n., Lyc., Mang., Merc-c., Merc., Nux-v., Rhus-t., Squil., Stap., Sul. Micturition, hurried , irresistible : Bry., Kre., Pho., Pul., Sul. Micturition, infrequent : Ap., Canth. Micturition, interrupted , intermittent, etc. : Agar., Ant-c., Carb-an., Caust., Clem., Con., Gels., Kali-c., Led., Lyc., Op., Sars., Sul., Thu. Micturition, involuntary : Caust., Fer., Pul., Rhus-t. Micturition, involuntary, in bed, bed-wetting : Bell., Calc-c., Caust., Cina., Merc., Pul., Rhus-t., Sil., Sul., Syph., Tub. Micturition, involuntary, in bed, during first sleep : Caust., Sep. Micturition, involuntary, coughing, on : Caust., Pho. Micturition, nightly : Lyc., Rhus-t. Micturition, retention , suppression, tardy, etc. (Comp. Discharges and Feeble.) : Aco., Ap., Arn., Ars., Cam., Canth., Hep., Kali-bi., Lyc., Op., Pul., Stram., Terb. Micturition, scanty : Ap., Canth., Colch., Dig., Grap., Hell., Op., Rut., Stap. Copyright © Médi-T 1999
